warmups.name: Arm Circles
warmups.desc: Circular rotations of arms to warm up shoulders.

warmups.name: Frankenstein
warmups.desc: Keep legs straight, kick opposite hand.

warmups.name: Walking Lunge with Twist
warmups.desc: Step into lunge and rotate torso toward lead leg.

warmups.name: Mountain Climbers
warmups.desc: Rapidly alternate knees to chest in plank position.

warmups.name: Hip Circles
warmups.desc: Rotate hips in wide circular motion to open the joints.

warmups.name: Inchworm
warmups.desc: Walk hands out to plank, then walk feet back to hands.

warmups.name: High Knees
warmups.desc: Run in place driving knees above hip height.

warmups.name: Butt Kicks
warmups.desc: Run in place kicking heels to glutes.

exercises.name: Push-Ups
exercises.desc: Standard bodyweight push-up, chest to floor.

exercises.name: Side Straddle Hops
exercises.desc: Traditional jumping jacks.

exercises.name: Leg Lifts
exercises.desc: Lying leg raises for lower abs.

exercises.name: Walking Lunges
exercises.desc: Forward step lunges, alternating legs.

exercises.name: Traveling Push-ups
exercises.desc: Push-up then walk hands left or right one step.

exercises.name: Med Ball Crunches
exercises.desc: Standard abdominal crunch (use backpack if needed).

exercises.name: Plank
exercises.desc: Hold forearms and toes, keep core braced.

exercises.name: Prisoner Squats
exercises.desc: Hands behind head, descend into squat.

exercises.name: Squat Jumps
exercises.desc: Explosive squat followed by a vertical jump.

exercises.name: Flutter Kicks
exercises.desc: Rapid scissor kicks while lying on back.

exercises.name: Diamond Push-Up
exercises.desc: Keep hands together in diamond shape under chest.

exercises.name: Box Jumps
exercises.desc: Jump onto a stable bench or chair.

exercises.name: Bird-Dog
exercises.desc: On all fours, extend opposite arm and leg simultaneously.

exercises.name: Dead Bug
exercises.desc: Lying on back, alternate lowering opposite arm and leg.

exercises.name: Glute Bridges
exercises.desc: Lift hips toward ceiling while lying on back.

exercises.name: Superman
exercises.desc: Lift arms and chest simultaneously while lying face down.

exercises.name: Reverse Lunges
exercises.desc: Step backward into a controlled lunge.

exercises.name: Calf Raises
exercises.desc: Rise onto toes and lower slowly.

exercises.name: Burpees
exercises.desc: Drop to plank, push-up, jump to feet, jump up.

exercises.name: Sit-Ups
exercises.desc: Full sit-up from floor, touch ankles at top.

exercises.name: Knees to Elbows
exercises.desc: Lying on back, drive knees up to meet elbows.

exercises.name: Handstand Push-Ups
exercises.desc: Kick up against a wall, lower head to floor and press.

exercises.name: Pistol Squats
exercises.desc: Single-leg squat, other leg extended in front.

exercises.name: Side Lunges
exercises.desc: Step wide to the side and lower into a lateral lunge.

exercises.name: Clap Push-Ups
exercises.desc: Explosive push-up with a hand clap at the top.

exercises.name: Single-Leg Glute Bridge
exercises.desc: One foot on floor, lift hips explosively.

exercises.name: Wide Push-Ups
exercises.desc: Hands wider than shoulder-width, targets chest.

exercises.name: Dive Bomber Push-Ups
exercises.desc: Swoop chest through arms in an arcing motion.

exercises.name: Tuck Jumps
exercises.desc: Jump and pull knees to chest at peak.

exercises.name: Alternating V-Ups
exercises.desc: From lying, reach hand to opposite raised leg.

exercises.name: Jump Rope (Air)
exercises.desc: Mimic jump rope motion without a rope.

exercises.name: Hollow Body Hold
exercises.desc: Lie on back, arms overhead, legs raised, lower back flat.

exercises.name: Tricep Dips
exercises.desc: Hands on chair behind you, dip and press.

exercises.name: One-Arm Push-Ups
exercises.desc: Single-arm push-up with feet wide for balance.

exercises.name: Bear Crawl
exercises.desc: Crawl on hands and feet, knees hovering an inch off ground.

exercises.name: Mike Tyson Push-Ups
exercises.desc: Kneel, sit back to heels, lean forward and push up.

exercises.name: Finger Tip Push-Ups
exercises.desc: Push-up balancing on fingertips to build grip and wrist strength.

exercises.name: Pull-Ups
exercises.desc: Hang from bar, pull chin above hands.

exercises.name: L-Sit Hold
exercises.desc: From seated, press hands and lift legs parallel to floor.

cooldowns.name: Hip Abduction
cooldowns.desc: Slow controlled leg lift to the side.

cooldowns.name: Walking Knee Hug
cooldowns.desc: Step into a knee hug squeeze.

cooldowns.name: Chest Stretch
cooldowns.desc: Hands behind back, open chest wide.

cooldowns.name: Child's Pose
cooldowns.desc: Kneel and reach arms forward on the floor.

cooldowns.name: Cat-Cow
cooldowns.desc: On all fours, alternate arching and rounding spine.

cooldowns.name: Seated Hamstring Stretch
cooldowns.desc: Seated with one leg extended, reach for toes.
